title: Add dark mode to the UI
body: Users are requesting a dark mode theme for the dashboard.

title: App crashes on startup with ValueError
body: When I run the app, it throws a ValueError about the parser being corrupted.

title: Corrupted parser in v2.0.0
body: Upgrading to 2.0.0 breaks the data processing pipeline. Getting a ValueError.

title: ValueError: Version 2.0.0 parser is corrupted
body: Can't process data anymore since the last merge. See traceback above.
